summary: Frontend testing of 5 new Landing Page sections (ValueFramingSection, SignalComparisonTable, FAQSection, TrustSection, FinalCTASection). All sections render correctly, accordion functionality works, CTA buttons open auth modal, Telegram links are correct, mobile responsiveness is good, and lazy loading works properly.

issues: Chart component warnings about width/height being -1 - non-blocking but should be addressed for cleaner console

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new sections have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Lazy loading with Suspense is implemented correctly
Mobile responsiveness is well implemented with proper breakpoints
FAQ Accordion uses Shadcn component correctly with collapsible behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new sections tested and working: ValueFramingSection (4 bullet points + closing statement), SignalComparisonTable (7 features comparison), FAQSection (5 accordion items with expand/collapse), TrustSection (2-column layout), FinalCTASection (2 CTA buttons). All CTA buttons correctly open auth modal. Telegram links point to https://t.me/betradarmus_bot. Mobile responsiveness verified on 390x844 viewport.
features_tested: ValueFramingSection rendering with 4 bullet points and closing statement
FAQSection Accordion - all 5 questions expand/collapse correctly
TrustSection two-column layout (Was wir nicht tun / Stattdessen)
FinalCTASection with 2 CTA buttons (Jetzt starten, Live-Bot aktivieren)
CTA buttons open auth modal correctly
Mobile responsiveness of all new sections (390x844 viewport)
Page scroll and lazy loading works

mocked_apis.notes: No APIs mocked - frontend only testing
